---
title: "VABI Project"
page-layout: full
toc: false
---

::: {.hero-image}
![](images/sailorshift_cover.png){.hero-img}
:::

::: {.section-container}

::: {.section-header}
## About This Project
:::

Oceanus Folk is a music genre that gained global recognition largely due to the success of Oceanus artist Sailor Shift. Beginning her career in the early 2020s as a member of the all-female band Ivy Echoes, Sailor later pursued a solo career and achieved a major breakthrough in 2028 when one of her singles reached the top of the global charts.

This project uses visual analytics to explore a knowledge graph dataset compiled by journalist Silas Reed, containing information about artists, albums, songs, collaborations, and musical influences. Through interactive Tableau dashboards, we investigate how Sailor Shift's influence spread through collaborations and musical inspiration, and how Oceanus Folk evolved within the broader music landscape.

---
::: {.section-header}
## Team
:::

::: {.team-grid}

::: {.team-member}
**Kandasamy Kayalvizhi**
:::

::: {.team-member}
**Kristen Choong**
:::

:::

:::
